descriptionTemplate:
This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF +[Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
All Awakener's {Tentacle DMG} +[Arg3]%.
When there are 1/2/3 other {Lemurian} Awakeners in the team, the {Tentacle DMG} generated by all Awakeners is additionally increased by 6%/15%/30%.
